[phrase] fork, [phrase] often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, [phrase] thrice. Compare H7991 (שָׁלִישׁ).
16.dv: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number;

16.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
16.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
16.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

17.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
17.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

17.gl: to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc.
17.kj: [idiom] be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, [phrase] husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, s

17.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
17.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
17.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

17.kj: [phrase] fork, [phrase] often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, [phrase] thrice. Compare H7991 (שָׁלִישׁ).
17.dv: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number;

17.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to cut or carve (wood, stone or other material); by implication, to hew, split, square, quarry, engrave
17.kj: cut, dig, divide, grave, hew (out, -er), made, mason.
